title: Quality Control in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger quality control in practice judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Quality Control in Practice is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Quality Control in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good quality control in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Quality Control in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
